title: wedelia vieirae
intro: Wedelia vieirae, also known as the butterfly weed, is a perennial plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Wedelia vieirae include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating wounds and skin infections. Wedelia vieirae can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or topical paste for its medicinal uses, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
